---

## Overview

> Web-based radio player with background streaming.

**Radio Streaming** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with TypeScript, React, Next.js.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"Neural Net Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#1a0011,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#2d001e,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#1a0011,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#2d001e,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#45002f,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
Radio-Streaming/
  .gitignore
  LICENSE
  README.md
  next-env.d.ts
  package-lock.json
  package.json
  tsconfig.json
  tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
  app/
    globals.css
    layout.tsx
    page.tsx
  components/
    ActivityTimeline.tsx
    CalibrationWizard.tsx
    Dashboard.tsx
    Heatmap.tsx
  lib/
    advanced-csi-engine.ts
    ambient-light.ts
    audio-sonar.ts
    bluetooth-scanner.ts
```

<br/>

## Technical Specifications

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `TypeScript` |
| **Project Category** | `Machine Learning / AI` |
| **Total Source Files** | `40` |
| **Frameworks** | `TypeScript`, `React`, `Next.js` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

<p align="left">
  <code>jspdf</code>  <code>next</code>  <code>three</code>  <code>@tensorflow/tfjs</code>  <code>@types/react</code>  <code>eslint-config-next</code>  <code>typescript</code>  <code>react-dom</code>  <code>idb</code>  <code>react</code>  <code>eslint</code>  <code>@react-three/fiber</code>  <code>@react-three/drei</code>  <code>@types/node</code>
